---
id: get-states
title: "List states/provinces for a country"
description: "Returns all states or provinces for the given ISO country code."
sidebar_label: "List states/provinces for a country"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/public/churchcrm-public-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List states/provinces for a country"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/public/data/countries/{countryCode}/states"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all states or provinces for the given ISO country code.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
